name: Finance Yahoo Stock Monitor
description: Canonical finance-monitoring pack: open Yahoo Finance on a specific stock quote page and capture repeated price snapshots for downstream analysis.

inputs.name: symbol
inputs.description: Ticker symbol to monitor on Yahoo Finance.

observationPlan.statusChangeHint: Track quote updates, price movement, and visible chart state as the observation heartbeat.
observationPlan.notes: Use this as the finance website replacement for the previous Teams canonical example. Pass a symbol input to monitor another ticker.

queue.consumerHint: A downstream analyzer can inspect quote snapshots and metadata for price changes or chart movement.
queue.analysisHint: Treat each snapshot as a quote checkpoint and compare recent captures to infer trend or trigger decisions.
